name: webtop
title: Ubuntu Webtop
description: Ubuntu desktop environment in your browser

defaultEnv.description: User ID the desktop runs as; files in /config are owned by this UID. Match the host user that owns the app data dir.
Group ID the desktop runs as. Match the host group that owns the app data dir.
Timezone for the desktop, e.g. America/New_York.
Optional username for the built-in HTTP Basic login (defense-in-depth behind Hola's forward-auth SSO gate). Leave blank to rely solely on SSO.
Optional password for the built-in HTTP Basic login. Generate one, e.g. `openssl rand -hex 16`. Leave blank to rely solely on SSO.
